summary: Malformed Copilot chat TOML now degrades discovery metadata to warnings and seeded Agent Flag defaults.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chatProviders.test.ts --test-name "providers route degrades malformed Copilot chat defaults to warnings instead of failing discovery"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved /chat/providers now degrades malformed Copilot chat TOML instead of failing discovery.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chatModels.copilot.test.ts --test-name "copilot models route degrades malformed chat defaults to warnings instead of failing discovery"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved /chat/models?provider=copilot now returns warnings and seeded Agent Flag defaults for malformed chat TOML.
